name: team3332-mobile
description: Capacitor native wrapper for the TEAM 3332 app (iOS + Android).

scripts.sync: npm run build:app && node sync-www.mjs && npx cap sync && node patch-native-config.mjs
scripts.sync:nopods: npm run build:app && node sync-www.mjs && npx cap copy ios && node patch-native-config.mjs
scripts.run:ios: npm run build:app && node sync-www.mjs && npx cap sync ios && node patch-native-config.mjs && npx cap run ios
scripts.run:android: npm run build:app && node sync-www.mjs && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android

comment_background_geolocation: Step 2 (background GPS) uses the free/community plugin @capacitor-community/background-geolocation (v1.x = the Capacitor 6 line). The web app wires it via window.Capacitor.registerPlugin('BackgroundGeolocation') and falls back to navigator.geolocation in the browser — see app/index.html GeoTracker. To upgrade later to the production-grade @transistorsoft/capacitor-background-geolocation (paid license), swap the registerPlugin call. After changing this, run `npm install` then `npx cap sync` on the Mac. See SETUP-CAPACITOR.md Step 3.
